MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
